summary: An unnamed ranker reflects on their humiliating defeat in the arena against an incredibly powerful opponent. Despite their past experience fighting professional gamers, the narrator realizes they were hopelessly outmatched by this unique monster-like adversary. The encounter forces the ranker to abandon their delusions of superiority and acknowledge the vast gap in skill.
key_moments: The narrator recalls their history of defeating various professional gamers in the arena.
The narrator faces a mysterious, monster-like opponent who proves to be overwhelmingly powerful.
The ranker experiences a moment of realization that their belief in being the top ranker was merely a dream.
